title: T-058 — advanceProjectGate + approveProjectGate (e-sig) + revertGate Server Actions (NPD-f)
prompt:
# T-058 — Gate advancement + approval Server Actions

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.6, §17.7, §17.12 (adjacency guard)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Three Server Actions enforcing gate advancement: advanceProjectGate (G0-G2 self-advance with blocker check), approveProjectGate (G3/G4 with bcrypt-verified password + e-signature SHA-256 hash + audit immutability), revertGate (admin-only audit-logged reverse).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_actions/advance-project-gate.ts: RBAC npd.gate.advance; calls getBlockers helper; applies adjacency guard nextGate(current) only; updates current_gate; emits 'npd.gate.advanced'.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_actions/approve-project-gate.ts: RBAC npd.gate.approve; takes {decision, notes, password}; verifies password via bcrypt against current user; on approve writes gate_approvals row with esigned_at + esign_hash=SHA-256(user_id+project_id+gate+timestamp); advances current_gate; emits 'npd.gate.approved'.
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_actions/revert-gate.ts: RBAC admin only; writes audit_events; emits 'npd.gate.reverted'.
4. Vitest covers blocker-rejection, adjacency violation (422 ADJACENCY_VIOLATION), password mismatch reject, hash determinism, and audit-event emission.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_actions/advance-project-gate.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_actions/approve-project-gate.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_actions/revert-gate.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_actions/_lib/gate-helpers.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_actions/__tests__/gate-actions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a project at G2 with one required checklist item not done, when advanceProjectGate to G3 is called, then it rejects with BLOCKERS_PRESENT and current_gate stays G2 per §17.6 blocker rule
2. Given a project at G2, when advanceProjectGate to G4 (non-adjacent) is called, then it rejects 422 ADJACENCY_VIOLATION per §17.12 adjacency guard
3. Given approveProjectGate is called with correct password, when commit succeeds, then gate_approvals row contains esign_hash matching SHA-256(user_id + project_id + gate_code + esigned_at) per §17.5 + §17.6 e-sig contract

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/gate-actions.test.ts with 4 cases (blocker reject, adjacency reject, password reject, hash determinism + audit emit) before actions exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test gate-actions'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip blocker check
- Do not allow non-adjacent advance (per §17.12)
- Do not store the password in any column or log
- Do not skip audit_events emission on revertGate

pipeline_inputs.description: advanceProjectGate + approveProjectGate (e-sig) + revertGate with blocker + adjacency + bcrypt + SHA-256 hash + audit.
pipeline_inputs.details: advanceProjectGate enforces blocker + adjacency. approveProjectGate verifies password via bcrypt then writes gate_approvals + esign_hash. revertGate is admin-only and audit-logged. Helper getBlockers + nextGate factored.
